# Pdfit — Laravel Document to PDF Converter

> Convert DOCX, Excel, PowerPoint, images, HTML, and Markdown to PDF in Laravel. One package, 20+ formats. No cloud API, no microservice. Works with Docker, Google Cloud Run, Azure.

Pdfit is a Laravel package that converts documents to PDF using Python (WeasyPrint, Pillow, pypandoc, LibreOffice) via uv. Single API: `Converter::toPdf($file)`. Install: `composer require veoksha/pdfit`.

Key facts:
- Supports DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODT, images (PNG, JPG, etc.), HTML, Markdown, TXT, CSV, RTF, EPUB, ZIP
- No external API; runs locally
- uv auto-installs Python; no manual Python setup
- macOS: `brew install pango cairo gdk-pixbuf libffi glib` for WeasyPrint
- LibreOffice required for Office formats

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/spiderdev27/pdfit/blob/main/README.md): Full docs, installation, usage, Cloud deployment
- [API / Architecture](https://github.com/spiderdev27/pdfit/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): How it works
- [Packagist](https://packagist.org/packages/veoksha/pdfit): Composer package
